description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu spent 12 hrs 16 mins coding, averaging 4 hrs 8 mins per day. His time was split across 5 projects, with the most work in Java, followed by Other, Markdown, and TypeScript. No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories were recorded in the provided data.
